javadoc_before:
/** * Partial base implementation of {@link TypeIdResolver}: all custom implementations * are strongly recommended to extend this class, instead of directly * implementing {@link TypeIdResolver}. *

* Note that instances created to be constructed from annotations * ({@link com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.annotation.JsonTypeIdResolver}) * are always created using no-arguments constructor; protected constructor * is only used sub-classes. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Partial base implementation of {@link TypeIdResolver}: all custom implementations * are strongly recommended to extend this class, instead of directly * implementing {@link TypeIdResolver}. * Note that ALL sub-class need to re-implement * {@link #typeFromId(DatabindContext, String)} method; otherwise implementation * will not work. *

* Note that instances created to be constructed from annotations * ({@link com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.annotation.JsonTypeIdResolver}) * are always created using no-arguments constructor; protected constructor * is only used sub-classes. */
